query: application crashes with segmentation fault when processing large files
notes: high-urgency crash bug; should surface critical/crash issues

query: add support for dark mode in the settings panel
notes: feature request; should surface enhancement/feature issues, not bugs

query: regression: login no longer works after upgrading to v2.3
notes: regression query; should surface regression-tagged or auth-related issues

query: documentation is missing for the REST API /users endpoint
notes: docs issue; should surface documentation gaps, not crashes

query: memory leak in background worker thread under heavy load
notes: performance/memory issue; should surface OOM or performance bugs

query: null pointer exception when user submits empty form fields
notes: bug with specific reproduction; should surface NPE / validation bugs

query: cannot reproduce: flaky test in CI pipeline fails intermittently
notes: flaky test / infra; should surface CI or flaky issues

query: proposal: support batch export of data as CSV
notes: feature proposal; should surface enhancement requests

query: stack overflow error when recursion depth exceeds limit
notes: critical crash; should surface overflow / crash issues
trivial docs fix; should surface low-urgency doc issues
